name: Draw Back
effect: The user moves themself and an adjacent ally back 1 space.

name: Obstruct
effect: When user has 1/2 or more HP, any opponent that moves onto a space adjacent to the user immediately ends their movement.

name: Pass
effect: The user can move through enemies. Ignores Obstruct.

name: Pivot
effect: The user moves themself to the other side of an ally.

name: Reposition
effect: The user moves an ally to the other side of them.

name: Swap
effect: The user swaps places with an adjacent ally.

name: Guard
effect: Opponents do not gain Charge through combat with the user.

name: Solidarity
effect: Hit+1 and Avoid+1 to all adjacent allies.

name: Celerity
effect: Permanently raise user's Movement stat by 1.

name: HP +3
effect: Permanently raise the user's HP stat by 3.

name: Attack +2
effect: Permanently raise the user's Attack stat by 2.

name: Defense +2
effect: Permanently raise the user's Defense stat by 2.

name: Luck +2
effect: Permanently raise the user's Luck stat by 2.

name: Speed +2
effect: Permanently raise the user's Speed stat by 2.

name: Dexterity +2
effect: Permanently raise the user's Dexterity stat by 2.

name: Resistance +2
effect: Permanently raise the user's Resistance stat by 2.

name: Escape Route
effect: If the user is at 1/2 HP or less, they may move adjacent to any ally (user spends all of their Movement doing this). User can perform their action after moving.

name: Wings of Mercy
effect: If an ally is at 1/2 HP or less, the user may move adjacent to that ally (user spends all of their Movement doing this). User can perform their action after moving.

name: Cancel Affinity
effect: Both the user and the opponent ignore Weapon Triangle bonuses and penalties during combat.

name: Triangle Adept
effect: When the user has WTA, they gain Advantage on all of their attacks; when they have WTD, they take Disadvantage on all of their attacks.

name: Rally Offenses
effect: The user gives an adjacent ally +3 Attack and +1 Hit until the start of the user's next phase. If this skill is activated, all other Rally skills that the user has may be activated on that same ally simultaneously.

name: Rally Reflexes
effect: The user gives an adjacent ally +3 Speed and +1 Avoid until the start of the user's next phase. If this skill is activated, all other Rally skills that the user has may be activated on that same ally simultaneously.

name: Rally Defenses
effect: The user gives an adjacent ally +2 Defense and +2 Resistance until the start of the user's next phase. If this skill is activated, all other Rally skills that the user has may be activated on that same ally simultaneously.

name: Rally Movement
effect: The user gives an adjacent ally +1 Movement until the start of the user's next phase. If this skill is activated, all other Rally skills that the user has may be activated on that same ally simultaneously.

name: Dual Wield
effect: The user gains another Weapon Proficiency.

name: Hardy Bearing
effect: Both user and foe cannot use skills that effect priority (such as Vantage, Desperation, and Quick Riposte) or frequency (such as Wary Fighter) of attack.

name: Vantage
effect: If user has 1/2 or under HP, they can attack first regardless of who initiates combat.

name: Brash Assault
effect: If user has 1/2 or less HP and initiates combat against an opponent that can counterattack, the user performs a Follow-Up Attack regardless of Speed.

name: Quick Riposte
effect: If user has 3/4 or more HP, the user can make a Follow-Up Attack if foe initiates combat.

name: Desperation
effect: If the user attacks at 1/2 or less HP, they can perform their Follow-Up Attack (if viable) before the opponent does a Counterattack.

name: Poison Body
effect: If an opponent attacking the user would recover HP from their attack through a Skill (i.e. Sol or Aether) or Refine (i.e. Resire), that opponent loses that HP instead of recovering it.

name: Wrath
effect: While the user is at 1/2 HP or less, the opponent's Critical Avoid is treated as though it is 5 lower.

name: Flashing Blade
effect: If the user's Speed is greater than the opponent's Speed and the user initiates combat, the user gains an additional +1 Charge after combat.

name: Heavy Blade
effect: If the user's Attack is greater than the opponent's Attack and the user initiates combat, the user gains an additional +1 Charge after combat.

name: Expertise
effect: Attack+3 and Hit+1.

name: Fortune
effect: User does not take double nor triple damage from Critical Hits.

name: Quickened Pulse
effect: All Combat Arts requiring 3 or more base charge to use require one less charge to activate.

name: Steal
effect: The user can use their action to do the following: unlock doors, chests, and anything else locked; steal an unequipped item if their speed is higher than the opponent's; or choose to steal money instead of an item equal to opponent's level times 10.

name: Keen Vision
effect: User can see into areas up to 4 spaces away in Fog of War.

name: Perform
effect: User refreshes an adjacent non-performing ally's movement and actions. User takes -3 to HP, and -2 to four additional combat stats of their choice.

name: Performance of the Focused
effect: When Perform is used, the target takes Advantage on their next attack. Wears off at the start of the user's next phase.

name: Performance of the Fortunate
effect: When Perform is used, during the target's next combat, their opponent takes disadvantage on their first attack. Wears off at the start of the user's next phase.

name: Performance of the Stalwart
effect: When Perform is used, during the target's next combat, their opponent may not Follow-Up. Wears off at the start of the user's next phase.

name: Inspiring Performance
effect: When Perform is used, target is also granted Attack, Speed, Defense, and Resistance+2 until the start of the user's phase.

name: Drag Back
effect: After combat, the user moves back 1 space with their opponent. If there is no room for the user to move back, this skill fails.

name: Quixotic
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid-3 for the User.

name: Parity
effect: Neither the user nor their opponent can activate any Strategy, Reflex, or Technique skills.

name: Swordbreaker
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid+3 when in combat with an opponent equipped with a Sword.

name: Lancebreaker
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid+3 when in combat with an opponent equipped with a Lance.

name: Axebreaker
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid+3 when in combat with an opponent equipped with an Axe.

name: Focus
effect: Hit+2 when there are no allies within a 2-tile radius.

name: Physical Specialist
effect: Hit+1 against opponents equipped with weapons that deal Physical damage. Avoid-1 against opponents equipped with weapons that deal Magical damage.

name: Bowbreaker
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid+3 when in combat with an opponent equipped with a Bow.

name: Daggerbreaker
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid+3 when in combat with an opponent equipped with a Dagger.

name: Heartseeker
effect: Avoid-2 to enemies adjacent to the user during combat.

name: Magical Specialist
effect: Hit+1 against opponents equipped with weapons that deal Magical damage. Avoid-1 against opponents equipped with weapons that deal Physical damage.

name: Animabreaker
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid+3 when in combat with an opponent equipped with Anima Magic.

name: Lightbreaker
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid+3 when in combat with an opponent equipped with Light Magic.

name: Darkbreaker
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid+3 when in combat with an opponent equipped with Dark Magic.

name: Even Rhythm
effect: On even turns, the opponent's Critical Avoid is treated as though it is 2 lower.

name: Odd Rhythm
effect: On odd turns, the opponent's Critical Avoid is treated as though it is 2 lower.

name: Blessed Strike
effect: Attacks made with a Shifting Stone calculate damage using the lower of the foe's Defense or Resistance. User gains the Furred Trait.

name: Distant Shot
effect: User's Max Range is increased by 1 when equipped with a Shifting Stone. User gains the Scaled Trait.

name: Grisly Wound
effect: The opponent takes 5 Post-Combat damage after any combat with the user.

name: Boon
effect: Heals the status conditions of allies adjacent to the user at the beginning of each turn.

name: Vigor
effect: At the start of their turn, all adjacent transformed allies gain +1 to their Gauge.

name: Blood Tide
effect: Attack+3 and Hit+1 to all adjacent allies.

name: White Tide
effect: Avoid+1 and Speed+3 to all adjacent allies.

name: Night Tide
effect: Defense+3 and Resistance+3 to all adjacent allies.

name: Charm
effect: Avoid+1 to all allies within a 3-tile radius.

name: Wrathful Staff
effect: User can now initiate combat with Staves. When attacking with a Staff, the user calculates the attack's Power as one would with any other physical weapon (factoring in the Staff's Might accordingly).

name: Live to Serve
effect: When healing allies with a staff, user also recovers the same amount.

name: Dazzling Staff
effect: User cannot counterattack. User's opponent cannot counterattack.

name: Monstrous
effect: The user gains the Fiendish trait. If targeted by a status-inflicting staff, weapon, or combat art the opponent must roll twice for accuracy and use the lower result to determine if the user is inflicted with a status (for weapons, the first roll is still used to determine whether or not the attack hits and deals damage).

name: Vengeful Cry
effect: User gains +2 Attack and +2 Hit when in combat with an opponent they have already been in combat with.

name: Coral Cover
effect: User doubles all terrain Effects and Movement penalties, both beneficial and not.

name: Shadow Gambit
effect: User ignores all terrain Effects and Movement penalties, both beneficial and not.

name: Anathema
effect: User takes 1/2 Damage from Anima and Dark Magic, and takes double Damage from Light magic.

name: Shove
effect: User pushes an ally 1 space away from the user.

name: Hit and Run
effect: After combat, the user moves 1 space back, regardless of remaining Movement. (Fails if user would move into a space it cannot land on).

name: Lunge
effect: After combat, user can move forward 1 space (user can swap with the opponent in this way).

name: Knock Back
effect: After combat, the opponent is pushed 1 space away from the user. If there is no room for the opponent to move into that space, this skill fails.

name: Mountain Climber
effect: Mountains and Sandbags become Rough Terrain for the user.

name: Seafarer
effect: Water becomes Rough Terrain to the user.

name: Acrobat
effect: All Rough Terrain becomes Standard Terrain to the user.

name: Master of Arms
effect: The user gains two more Weapon Proficiencies.

name: Smite
effect: User pushes an ally 2 spaces away from the user.

name: Natural Cover
effect: When user fights in terrain with terrain effects, all damage taken -3 (down to a minimum of 1).

name: Defender
effect: When rescuing, user gains Defense+2 and Resistance+2.

name: Steady Stance
effect: If the user has 1/2 or more HP, when the opponent initiates the battle, -3 to physical damage received (down to a minimum of 1).

name: Warding Stance
effect: If the user has 1/2 or more HP, when the opponent initiates the battle, -3 to magical damage received (down to a minimum of 1).

name: Vengeful Fighter
effect: If the user has 1/2 or above HP and the foe initiates combat, user makes a guaranteed Follow-up Attack.

name: Wary Fighter
effect: If the user has 1/2 or above HP, neither combatant can perform a Follow-up Attack.

name: Svalinn Shield
effect: The user does not take effective damage from Scalerending weapons.

name: Canter
effect: After performing all actions, the user may move again up to 2 spaces.

name: Savior
effect: When rescuing, the user does not take any penalties.

name: Elbow Room
effect: When user fights in terrain with no terrain effects, +2 Damage during combat.

name: Death Blow
effect: If the user has 1/2 or more HP, when user initiates the battle, +3 Damage dealt.

name: Certain Blow
effect: If the user has 1/2 or more HP, when user initiates the battle, +1 to Hit.

name: Grani's Shield
effect: The user does not take effective damage from Furflaying weapons.

name: Camaraderie
effect: Recover 5 HP at the beginning of the user's turn if there is at least 1 ally within 2 spaces.

name: Deliverer
effect: When rescuing, user gains Movement+2.

name: Air Superiority
effect: Hit+3 and Avoid+3 when in combat with other Fliers.

name: Trample
effect: If the opponent is not a Cavalry or Flier, the user does +3 damage.

name: Duelist's Stance
effect: If the user has 1/2 or more HP, when the opponent initiates the battle, +1 to Avoid.

name: Darting Blow
effect: If the user has 1/2 or more HP, when user initiates the battle, +3 to Speed.

name: Guidance
effect: Infantry and Armor allies within the user's Movement Range can move to a space adjacent to the user (the moving ally spends all of their Movement doing this). The moving ally can perform their action after moving.

name: Iote's Shield
effect: The user does not take effective damage from Wingclipping weapons.

name: Beastly Ward
effect: When an adjacent ally is hit by an attack, the user may activate this skill to reduce the damage of that attack by 1/2.

name: Pickpocket
effect: After combat, the user can obtain one unequipped item from the opponent's inventory, or gold equal to half the value of the opponent's equipped weapon. Can only be used if the user is adjacent to their opponent.

name: Bliss
effect: The user transfers all Charge (minus the Charge spent activating this skill) to an adjacent ally.

name: Guardian
effect: When an adjacent ally is hit, the user can take the Damage that ally would have taken—after factoring in that ally's Defense or Resistance—instead.

name: Curved Shot
effect: The Max Range of the user's equipped Bow is increased by 1 per X charge spent, up to a maximum of 5 additional Range. If the user can Attack multiple times (i.e. due to Follow-Up Attacks or a Brave refine) and wants to, the user must spend the required Charge per attack before combat starts.

name: Bane
effect: The user's Dagger attacks gain an additional +1 Hit per X Charge spent for this combat, up to a maximum of 5 extra Hit.

name: Gamble
effect: The user gains +5 Hit. However, all attacks made by the user that are not Critical Hits are treated as misses.

name: Imbue
effect: Increase the amount of HP restored by a healing Staff Effect by 5.

name: Multitask
effect: After using a non-healing staff Effect on an ally, that ally also recovers 5 HP.

name: Sorcery Blade
effect: The user's attack targets Resistance instead of Defense.

name: Cease Conflict
effect: The opponent's weapon immediately becomes unequipped and combat immediately ends. Only works on opponents whose level is equal to or lower than the user's.

name: Knightkneeler
effect: The user's attack gains the Furflaying attribute.

name: Helmsplitter
effect: The user's attack gains the Scalerending attribute.

name: Grounder
effect: The user's attack gains the Wingclipping attribute.

name: Bane of Monsters
effect: The user's attack gains the Fiendslaying attribute.

name: Pavise
effect: When the user is attacked from 1 space away, reduce Damage by 1/2.

name: Aegis
effect: When the user is attacked from 2 or more spaces away, reduce Damage by 1/2.

name: Counter
effect: When the user is attacked from 1 space away, the opponent also takes Damage equal to the amount of Damage the user took.

name: Countermagic
effect: When the user is attacked from 2 or more spaces away, the opponent also takes Damage equal to the amount of Damage the user took.

name: Miracle
effect: Allows the user to survive an otherwise lethal blow, instead being left with 1HP.

name: Astra
effect: Doubles the total Damage dealt to an opponent.

name: Sol
effect: After attacking, the user heals themself 1/2 of the Damage they just dealt to the opponent.

name: Luna
effect: When dealing Damage to an opponent, calculate as if they had 1/2 less Defense or Resistance.

name: Deep Bite
effect: The user doubles all Post-Combat damage they would deal to the opponent after this combat.

name: Subdue
effect: The user automatically hits and does a Critical Hit. However, the user cannot Follow-Up Attack, and if the attack would bring the opponent's HP to 0, they are left with 1 HP instead.

name: Dragon Fang
effect: Add 1/2 of the user's Attack to the total Damage dealt.

name: Finesse Blade
effect: Add 1/2 of the user's Dexterity to the total Damage dealt.

name: Ignis
effect: Add 1/2 of the user's Defense to the total Damage dealt.

name: Glacies
effect: Add 1/2 of the user's Resistance to the total Damage dealt.

name: Vengeance
effect: Add Damage equal to 1/2 of the HP the user is missing to the total Damage dealt.

name: Revitalize
effect: When the user heals an ally's status, all other allies recover status as well.

name: Alert Stance
effect: Until the beginning of the user's next turn, the user is treated as though they have 5 higher avoid.

name: Triangle Attack
effect: The user's next attack automatically hits and Critical hits, but cannot perform a Follow-Up Attack. This skill can only be used when two other allies with Triangle Attack are each in a Cardinal Direction of the target, are all of equal distance from the target, and are all no further than 2 spaces away from the target.

name: Dark Spikes
effect: Each opponent within 2 spaces takes 10 damage.

name: Heavenly Light
effect: When healing an ally with a staff, all other allies recover 10HP.

name: Galeforce
effect: After the user attacks, refresh the user's Movement and Actions (once per phase).

name: Eclipse
effect: When dealing damage to an opponent, treat it as if they have no Defense or Resistance.

name: Aether
effect: When dealing damage to an opponent, treat it as if they had 1/2 less Defense or Resistance. Then, the user heals themself 1/2 of the damage they just dealt.

name: Fire Emblem
effect: After combat, this character and all allies gain +2 to all stats until the start of the user's phase.

name: Distant Counter
effect: The user may counterattack at any range.

name: Stalwart Guard
effect: The user cannot be moved out of their position by an opponent's Skill (such as Lunge).

name: Steady Heart
effect: This unit recovers from Status Effects quickly, taking only 1 turn to recover instead of the usual duration.

name: Fortified Heart
effect: This unit cannot be inflicted with Status Effects.

name: Self-Destruct
effect: The user deals damage equal to their Attack stat to everyone within 2 spaces (Ignoring Defense and Resistance). User is removed from the Map.

name: Divide
effect: User spends half their current HP to create a copy of themself; the copy's Stats, Weapons, Traits, and current HP (after halving) are equal to that of the original. Copies do not inherit the Skills of their user. Neither the user nor their copies can be healed while copies are on the field.

name: Upheaval
effect: Each opponent on the map takes 5 damage.

name: Magic Seal
effect: Anima, Light, Dark and Staves of all units (user included) do not work within 10 spaces of the user.
